data.name: Corruption Crucible
data.detailed_description:
They came from outer fucking space!

Extraterrestrial scum is trying to transform everyone on earth into their bimbo soldiers! Will you, the badass Agent, be able to stop them? Or will you get caught in one of their many traps and become assimilated as Earth's last chance at being saved joins the invader's kinky cause?

Corruption Crucible is a kinky, retro style FPS that brings a uniquely kinky, sci-fi, and erotic experience as you try to make it through the Extraterrestrial's compound to discover it's power source known as The Core. There are plenty of tricks that you will have to watch out for while you blast away enemies and avoid their kinky counter-fire.

Each level is not only filled with the erotic invaders, but also with titillating traps. If you don't watch where you are going, you might just fall through a trapdoor of encasing latex to package you up for your foes! Take a break to watch the invader's favorite television channel and before you know it, you'll be too distracted to notice that you can't stop masturbating in front of everyone.

Struggle through Tricks, Traps, and Enemy Attacks!

Make your way through six levels and then destroy the powerful core before you are worn down and caught by the Hunters, Scientists, and Corrupted Bimbo Agents that are out to "convince" you to join them instead! You will have to struggle to escape, but each capture type has a little twist to make it trickier.

Blast them back to the galaxy they came from!

Recover strange and powerful weapons like the dangerous Jupiter Cannon or the Bimbo Ray Gun to keep the Extraterrestrials at bay and unlock togglable, permanent boosts to grow in power as you explore and blast through each level in your journey to save the planet. There are plenty of difficulties to choose from, so whether you're a virgin or you can't stop climaxing, there's a perfect difficulty level for you!

data.short_description: Extraterrestrials are turning everyone on earth into their bimbo soldiers! They thought they could do the same to you, but they are about to learn how wrong they are! Avoid kinky traps and blast through erotic otherworldly enemies in this retro Boomer Shooter sci-fi FPS... or become a bimbo trying!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10/11 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 support, x86_64 CPU with SSE4.2 support, ARMv8 CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full OpenGL 3.3 support or Direct3D 11 support (Windows).
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
